name: MongoDB + Mongo Express
description: A scalable, document-oriented NoSQL database paired with Mongo Express, a lightweight web-based administration interface.

aws.parity: The MongoDB wire protocol you use locally is the same DocumentDB speaks — same drivers, queries and indexes.
aws.deploy: Provision a DocumentDB cluster and repoint your connection string (add the RDS CA bundle for TLS).

variables.label: MongoDB Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the MongoDB database server.

variables.label: Mongo Express Web Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Mongo Express web administration UI.

variables.label: Root Username
variables.description: The root username for the MongoDB administrator account.

variables.label: Root Password
variables.description: The password for the MongoDB administrator account.
